segment_1.headline: That's a raw number.
segment_1.copy: You opened this at a {score}. That takes honesty. Most people wait until it's worse. You didn't. That's the whole reason you're here.

segment_2.headline: Something's been sitting with you.
segment_2.copy: A {score} means you feel it — that quiet gap between where you are and where you want to be. The good news: you noticed. That's already more than most people do.

segment_3.headline: Right in the middle. Honest.
segment_3.copy: A {score} is the most common opening number on this app. It's not bad — it's real. It says: we're good, but we could be more. That feeling? That's what you're here to work with.

segment_4.headline: You're here early. That's the best time.
segment_4.copy: A {score} means the foundation is solid. You're not here because things fell apart — you're here because you care about not letting them. That kind of proactive love is rare.

segment_5.headline: High, and still here. That says everything.
segment_5.copy: You started at a {score}. You could've skipped this. You didn't. That tells me you know that good relationships don't stay good on their own — they need tending. Let's tend.
